title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Airtel India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
